# FarmPulse AI

> Agentic crop risk intelligence platform for Indian agriculture, built for the ET GenAI Hackathon domain-specialized agents track.

## Site Summary
- FarmPulse AI monitors district-level crop stress using a NASA POWER-backed vegetation reference snapshot, weather data, crop calendars, and pest-risk heuristics.
- It provides multilingual farmer advisories, including Marathi advisory flows for Maharashtra.
- It exposes institutional dashboards for FPOs, insurers, and government early-warning workflows.
- It maintains a full agent audit trail with confidence, escalations, and timestamps.

## Key Routes
- /overview: Command center dashboard
- /districts: District risk explorer
- /farmer-advisory: Multilingual farmer advisory demo
- /institutional: FPO and insurer dashboard
- /audit: Full agent audit trail

## Flagship Scenario
A farmer in Maharashtra enters a query in Marathi about fertilizer timing given current soil conditions and a 5-day weather forecast. The system reasons over NDVI, weather, soil, crop stage, and pest risk, then responds in Marathi with actionable advice.

## APIs
- GET /api/districts
- GET /api/district/{id}
- POST /api/analyze
- POST /api/farmer-query
- GET /api/audit-log
- POST /api/simulate-edge-case

## More Detail
- /llms-full.txt
